areas.name: Senior Center Programming and Membership
areas.context: The Rockville Senior Center is a large facility serving adults age 60 and above. Programming spans fitness, recreation, education, arts, health and wellness, and social engagement.
common_processes: Emergency response for medical and behavioral events
key_considerations: ADA accessibility for all programs and facilities
Emergency protocols designed for older adult populations
Coordination with Rockville Seniors Inc. and the Rockville Commission on Aging
areas.format_note: Medical and behavioral emergency response at the Senior Center is Format Type 2 (Decision-Support).

areas.name: Villages Program (Aging in Place)
areas.context: Links residents age 60 and above to neighborhood volunteers who assist with tasks enabling aging in place. The program operates through established neighborhood Village chapters and continues to expand into new neighborhoods.
key_considerations: Liability for volunteer activities in private residences [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING — confirm with City Risk Management]
Adult Protective Services referral protocols [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]

areas.name: Senior Transportation Services
cost_centers: Part of Senior Citizen Support Services
areas.context: CDL-licensed drivers provide passenger transportation in City-owned vehicles, primarily to senior programs, medical appointments, and community activities.
common_processes: Driver license and medical certificate tracking
key_considerations: See Fleet Services entry in Parks and Facilities Maintenance Division for full compliance context.

areas.name: Senior Outreach and Assistance Services
areas.context: Outreach Workers conduct community visits and connect seniors to services. The Senior Assistance Fund provides financial support to eligible seniors. A Mobile Market partnership with the Capital Area Food Bank serves seniors at the center.

outreach: Language access support for non-English-speaking participants
assistance_fund: Donor coordination with the Rockville Recreation and Parks Foundation

key_considerations: HIPAA considerations for health-related referrals [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]
Language access requirements [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING — confirm City language access policy]
Coordination with Montgomery County Aging and Disability Services [VERIFY BEFORE PUBLISHING]
